User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block internal/utility routes from crawling
Disallow: /compare
Disallow: /registration
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Allow key Googlebot-specific paths
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Allow: /mba/
Allow: /btech/
Allow: /mbbs/
Allow: /bca/
Allow: /bba/
Allow: /colleges
Allow: /courses
Allow: /exams
Allow: /blog
Allow: /university/

# Crawl-delay for other bots
User-agent: Bingbot
Crawl-delay: 5

User-agent: YandexBot
Crawl-delay: 10

Sitemap: https://studycups.in/sitemap.xml
